location.description: Located at AASTMT El Alamein Campus within Egypt’s new smart educational and medical hub.

establishment.parent_institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport

undergraduate.objective: Prepare competent pharmacists capable of delivering high-quality pharmaceutical care
Prepare clinical pharmacists with advanced patient care and therapeutic decision-making skills

training_and_practice.description: Integrated practical and clinical training aligned with pharmacy practice, patient care, and healthcare system needs.

core_balance: Advanced pharmacy practice and patient care
curriculum_and_education.curriculum_development: Continuously updated to reflect recent advances in pharmacy practice and healthcare

facilities_and_resources: Modern infrastructure supporting smart pharmacy education

future_direction: Alignment with international pharmacy education standards

quality_assurance.qa_description: Adoption of continuous improvement culture through seminars, scientific conferences, and systematic development of academic and administrative staff.

objectives: Excellence in providing high-quality pharmacy education
Enhancing student services and academic support
Fulfilling social responsibility toward the community
Graduating pharmacists highly competitive in the labor market

vision_mission.vision: Achieve international leadership in smart pharmacy education and research, with a positive impact on the quality of life.
vision_mission.mission: Provide world-class and intelligent pharmacy education, research, and sustainable professional development that enhances healthcare quality.

dean.role: Dean of the College of Pharmacy – El Alamein Campus
